name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
description: Income support scheme for eligible landholding farmer families, paid directly into verified bank accounts.

benefit.description: INR 6,000 annually in three instalments of INR 2,000, subject to current eligibility and exclusion rules.

other_conditions: Eligible landholding farmer families must satisfy current PM-KISAN land-record and exclusion criteria.

application.deadline: Open throughout the year, subject to verification

ai_metadata.estimated_processing_time: Subject to land-record and eKYC verification

ai_explanation.summary: Annual income support for eligible landholding farmer families.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm landholding, eKYC, bank details, and exclusion criteria on the PM-KISAN portal.
tips: Complete eKYC and ensure the bank account details match your Aadhaar record.
next_steps: Complete eKYC if it is pending.

source.organization: Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop-insurance scheme that helps enrolled farmers manage financial losses from notified crop risks in notified areas and seasons.

benefit.description: Farmers pay subsidised premiums under notified seasonal plans; sum insured and claims depend on local notifications and crop loss assessment.

other_conditions: The crop, area, and season must be notified, and enrolment must be completed within the applicable seasonal window.

required_documents: Land Record or Tenant Farmer Proof

application.deadline: Check the notified seasonal enrolment deadline

benefits.financial: Insurance claim based on notified sum insured and assessed loss

ai_explanation.summary: Crop-risk protection for farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Check whether your crop, village or area, and season are notified before the enrolment deadline.
tips: Save the acknowledgement and premium receipt after enrolment.

source.organization: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
